title: Build grazing RPG NPC map page

log.context: Build grazing RPG NPC map page

The page loads. Here's a summary of what was built:

---

**What was built: `/mnt/data/hello-world/grazing.html` — "The Commons"**

A pure canvas 2D, no-framework RPG-style NPC grazing world. Key design choices:

**Map:** 800x560 canvas, 16px tiles, 50x35 grid. Features grass (4 shades of seeded variation), dirt paths (horizontal + vertical crossing), a pond (bottom-left, with shimmer highlights), two top buildings + one bottom-right building, scattered trees (with trunk/canopy), and rocks.
